SEARCH
Package com.orasaka.core.engine

Class AbstractOrasakaEngine

java.lang.Object
com.orasaka.core.engine.AbstractOrasakaEngine
Direct Known Subclasses:
OrasakaEngine
public abstract sealed class AbstractOrasakaEngine extends Object permits OrasakaEngine
Core Orchestration Engine for the Orasaka CORS library.

Implements the Bridge Pattern to decouple host applications from Spring AI internals. Manages the integration of RAG, Tooling, and MCP protocols.

High-concurrency tasks are executed using Java 21 Virtual Threads to ensure non-blocking performance.

This class is sealed and permits only OrasakaEngine as a subclass, enforcing a type-safe, exhaustive engine hierarchy per AGENTS.md §2.A.

See Also:

  • ChatModel

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractOrasakaEngine

      protected AbstractOrasakaEngine(Map<String,org.springframework.ai.chat.model.ChatModel> chatModels, Map<String,org.springframework.ai.image.ImageModel> imageModels, Map<String,org.springframework.ai.embedding.EmbeddingModel> embeddingModels, Map<String,org.springframework.ai.audio.tts.TextToSpeechModel> speechModels, CoreProperties properties, OrasakaToolRegistry toolRegistry, OrasakaKnowledgeService knowledgeService, McpOrchestrator mcpOrchestrator, OrasakaMemoryResolver memoryResolver)
      Initializes the engine with all required cognitive components.
      Parameters:
      chatModels - Map of available chat model providers.
      imageModels - Map of available image model providers.
      embeddingModels - Map of available embedding model providers.
      speechModels - Map of available speech model providers.
      properties - Configuration properties (Mandatory: defaultProvider).
      toolRegistry - Local Java tool registry.
      knowledgeService - RAG knowledge orchestration service.
      mcpOrchestrator - Model Context Protocol bridge.
      memoryResolver - Resolver for session-based chat memory.

  • Method Details

    • chat

      public OrasakaChatResponse chat(OrasakaChatRequest request)
      Executes a chat request using the active provider with agentic capabilities.

      This method is thread-safe and non-blocking as it utilizes Java 21 Virtual Threads via an internal executor to perform AI inference, local Java tool calls, and context retrieval in a decoupled manner.

      Parameters:
      request - The domain-specific chat request containing user prompts and context.
      Returns:
      A synchronized chat response carrying the final text result and conversation metadata.
      Throws:
      OrasakaException - If virtual thread execution fails or the active provider is missing.
      See Also:
      • OrasakaChatRequest
      • OrasakaChatResponse
      • ChatModel

    • stream

      public reactor.core.publisher.Flux<OrasakaChatResponse> stream(OrasakaChatRequest request)
      Executes a chat request using the active provider with agentic capabilities, returning the response as a reactive streaming Flux.

      This method utilizes Spring AI's underlying stream model. Setup operations (RAG, MCP context retrieval) are performed lazily when a client subscribes. When executed within a virtual thread or reactor flow, it does not block the main event loop threads.

      Parameters:
      request - The domain-specific chat request containing user prompts and context.
      Returns:
      A Flux emitting individual OrasakaChatResponse token chunks reactively.
      Throws:
      OrasakaException - If active provider resolution or downstream streaming initialization fails.
      See Also:
      • OrasakaChatRequest
      • OrasakaChatResponse
      • Flux
      • ChatModel.stream(Prompt)

    • generateImage

      public OrasakaImageResponse generateImage(OrasakaImageRequest request)
      Executes an image generation request using the active provider.

      This method is non-blocking and thread-safe as it submits the image generation task to a Virtual Thread executor, allowing high concurrency under local resource limits.

      Parameters:
      request - The domain-specific image generation request details (prompt, dimensions).
      Returns:
      A synchronized image response containing target URLs or metadata.
      Throws:
      OrasakaException - If image generation execution fails or active provider misconfiguration occurs.
      See Also:
      • OrasakaImageRequest
      • OrasakaImageResponse
      • ImageModel

    • generateSpeech

      public byte[] generateSpeech(OrasakaSpeechRequest request)
      Executes a Text-To-Speech request using the active provider.

      This method is non-blocking and thread-safe as it processes the TTS generation asynchronously on a Virtual Thread. Accepts an OrasakaSpeechRequest carrying an OrasakaContext so that per-user voice models and speech preferences are resolved dynamically.

      Parameters:
      request - The speech generation specification including prompt text and user context preferences.
      Returns:
      A byte array containing the raw audio data produced by the TTS provider.
      Throws:
      OrasakaException - If speech generation execution fails or no TTS model matches the active provider.
      See Also:
      • OrasakaSpeechRequest
      • TextToSpeechModel
      • OrasakaContext

    • resolveChatModel

      protected org.springframework.ai.chat.model.ChatModel resolveChatModel()
      Resolves and returns the configured ChatModel for the active provider.

      Looks up the active provider in the chat models registry mapping.

      Returns:
      The configured ChatModel corresponding to the active provider.
      Throws:
      OrasakaException - If no ChatModel is registered or configured for the active provider.
      See Also:
      • ChatModel
      • getActiveProvider()

    • getActiveProvider

      protected String getActiveProvider()
      Identifies the current active AI provider key from global configuration properties.
      Returns:
      The provider key (e.g., "ollama", "openai").
      Throws:
      OrasakaException - If the default provider configuration property is missing or blank.
      See Also:
      • CoreProperties

    • getBaseUrl

      protected String getBaseUrl()
      Resolves the base URL endpoint for the active provider configured in the properties.
      Returns:
      The base URL string targeting the active provider's API endpoint.
      Throws:
      OrasakaException - If the base URL property override is missing for the active provider.
      See Also:
      • getActiveProvider()
      • CoreProperties
